summary: Iteration 50 - Responsive Design Pass Testing Complete. All major responsive features verified across mobile (375px), tablet (768px), and desktop (1920px) viewports. Key responsive patterns working correctly: dashboard quick actions 2x2 grid on mobile, welcome block stats stacking, practices list mobile card layout, Creator Control Room metrics adaptive grid (2-col mobile, 3-col tablet, 6-col desktop), no horizontal overflow on tested pages.

mobile_375px.no_horizontal_overflow: Note: Some measurement showed overflow but visual inspection shows content fits correctly

details.md_breakpoint_768px: Correctly switches between mobile (hamburger) and desktop (sidebar) at 768px
details.sm_breakpoint_640px: Quick actions switch from 2-col to 4-col at sm breakpoint

responsive_patterns_verified.flex_col_sm_flex_row: Header stacking on mobile, row on desktop
responsive_patterns_verified.grid_cols_2_sm_grid_cols_4: Quick actions 2x2 on mobile, 4-col on tablet/desktop
responsive_patterns_verified.hidden_sm_grid: Table header hidden on mobile, visible on tablet/desktop
responsive_patterns_verified.sm_hidden: Mobile cards visible only on mobile
responsive_patterns_verified.overflow_x_hidden: Body overflow-x hidden prevents horizontal scroll

context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 50 verified all responsive design features. Key breakpoints: sm=640px, md=768px, lg=1024px. At 767px and below: mobile mode (hamburger menu, sidebar hidden, 2-col quick actions). At 768px and above: desktop mode (sidebar visible, 4-col quick actions). Practices list uses hidden sm:grid for table header and sm:hidden for mobile cards. Creator Control Room metrics use grid-cols-2 sm:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-6. All pages tested show no horizontal overflow at 375px mobile viewport.
